---
title: "残日留痕"
subtitle: "Residualsun"
image: "star.gif"
image-alt: "less is more"
back-to-top-navigation: false

about:
  template: solana
  image-width: 28em
  id: hero-heading
page-layout: full

execute: 
  freeze: false
  echo: false
  warning: false
  
header-includes: >
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/index.css">
resources:
  - assets/index.css
  
comments: false
---

<br><br>

::: {#hero-heading}
你好，这里是黄国政的主页。

[learn more →](/about){.about-links .subtitle}
:::
